patterns_recognized: Extreme positive edge (+20pp) picks correlate with model over-confidence not real edge: SEA@CHW (+31pp, lost 12-8) and NYM@ARI (+23pp, lost 1-3) on 05-08; OAK@BAL (+22.5pp) today matches the same signature.
Small-sample SP running hot = model blindspot: Misiorowski (NYY@MIL, 05-08 loss); Payton Tolle (3 GS, 2.04 ERA) is today analog for TB@BOS; model systematically underrates hot SPs with limited data.
COL@PHI recurring failure: same matchup was a LOSS on 05-08 (COL 9-7, PHI picked with -18pp edge); today re-appears as PLATINUM with -21.33pp edge and three distinct risk flags.

Stage 1/2 divergence >0.15 on CHC@TEX (f5=70.6% vs full=46.9%, gap=0.237) signals bullpen dependency; CHC advantage evaporates in the full game making bullpen status the critical unverifiable variable.
PLATINUM tier ~43% historical hit rate and home-favorite over-confidence at >65% raw probability (calibration shows real rate ~58%) continue to require extra scrutiny.

WSH @ MIA.reasoning: Edge -5.19pp outside [4,15] band; tier already SKIP. Cade Cavalli vs Sandy Alcantara with no anomalous signals. fair_prob=0.5643 confirms MIA is a real market favorite; model agrees but lacks conviction to play. No postgame pattern suggests override.

OAK @ BAL.reasoning: Raw model 0.725 calibrates to ~0.611 (70-80% bin: 5/10 actual hits, 50% real rate). Edge +22.5pp is well outside [4,15] band — exact signature of 05-08 losses: SEA@CHW (+31pp) and NYM@ARI (+23pp). F1_xera_gap=1.29 asterisk-flagged (small sample). Stake_mult already zero; DOWNGRADE aligns claude_tier with staking reality.

TB @ BOS.reasoning: Payton Tolle (BOS SP) has only 3 GS in 2026 at 2.04 ERA over 17.2 IP — small-sample SP running hot, matching the Misiorowski pattern that burned NYY@MIL on 05-08. Per heuristic 3, SP-edge is unreliable below 6 starts; TB pick depends on Tolle being weak when his early results say otherwise. Yesterday TB@BOS loss (ran into BOS pitching wall) directly reinforces caution.

COL @ PHI.reasoning: Four independent failure signals: (1) edge -21.33pp triggers heuristic 2; (2) PLATINUM ~43% hit rate per heuristic 4; (3) this exact matchup was a LOSS on 05-08 (COL 9-7 despite PHI heavily favored); (4) bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade=True internally flagged. Vegas prices PHI at 76.7% while model sees only 55.4% — 21pp market disagreement.

LAA @ TOR.reasoning: Edge +19.41pp outside [4,15] band; already SKIP. Spencer Miles (TOR SP) has 0 GS in 2026 — 18 IP entirely as a reliever — making this a bullpen day with no SP-quality anchor. TOR at 67.4% raw calibrates to ~58%; fair_prob=0.4802 means Vegas is nearly 50/50 while model overstates TOR. SKIP appropriate.

HOU @ CIN.reasoning: Tier SKIP with acute_roster stress warning on HOU. Kai-Wei Teng (HOU SP, 1 GS in 2026, 23 IP mostly as reliever) is a thin SP profile. HOU won this same matchup 10-0 on 05-08 but today acute_roster flag introduces uncertainty the model cannot fully price. SKIP confirmed.

MIN @ CLE.reasoning: bullpen_fatigue warning flags CLE bullpen risk. CLE at 65.93% raw is in the home-favorite over-confidence zone (>65%), calibrating to ~58%. Andrew Morris (MIN SP, 0 GS in 2026 — pure reliever making a spot start) adds uncertainty both ways. SKIP appropriate.

SEA @ CHW.reasoning: Edge +17.9pp outside [4,15] band; already SKIP. Same matchup produced the worst loss on 05-08: CHW picked at +31pp edge, lost 12-8 to SEA. Model again rates CHW above a market that has SEA near 50/50 (fair_prob=0.4506 for CHW). Recurring CHW over-confidence vs SEA is a documented red flag.

NYY @ MIL.reasoning: Carlos Rodon has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — SP-edge score impossible. Logan Henderson (MIL SP, 2 GS, 8 IP, 4.50 ERA) also very limited data. This exact matchup on 05-08 was a LOSS when model underestimated MIL rookie SP Misiorowski. PENDING status is correct; no pick should be forced.

CHC @ TEX.reasoning: Stage 1/2 disagreement is extreme: f5=0.706 vs full=0.469, gap=0.237 (well above 0.15 threshold). CHC edge depends on bullpen late leverage that cannot be verified as rested. Jacob deGrom (TEX SP, id=594798) is an elite arm the Stage 1 model likely underrates. external_modifiers stress warning and confidence_downgrade=True both flagged internally.

PIT @ SF.reasoning: Stage 1/2 disagreement of 0.199 is above 0.15 threshold but no stress warnings or confidence_downgrade flag. Bubba Chandler (PIT SP, 7 GS in 2026, 4.76 ERA) exceeds the 6-start minimum for reliable SP-edge data. F2_xwoba_gap=0.031 is a real lineup signal. Edge 4.99pp at minimum qualifying threshold with no other red flags stacking. Low-conviction CONFIRM.

NYM @ ARI.reasoning: Near-zero edge (+1.15pp); already SKIP. bullpen_fatigue stress warning flags ARI bullpen risk. This same matchup on 05-08 was a LOSS for ARI when model had 68% confidence (+23pp). Today model has dramatically lower conviction (51.15%), which is appropriate. SKIP confirmed.

STL @ SD.reasoning: Tier SKIP despite edge 12.28pp technically in-band — grader quality filters correctly excluded this. Kyle Leahy (STL SP) is a limited-data arm; Walker Buehler (SD) has been inconsistent. On 05-08 STL won this matchup 6-0 with McGreevy dominant, but today has different pitchers. SKIP is prudent.

ATL @ LAD.reasoning: F3_swing_take_gap=1851.7 is a large lineup-quality signal independent of SP quality. Stage 1/2 gap is small (f5=0.709 vs full=0.650, gap=0.058). Edge +9.81pp within band. Raw 0.6503 calibrates to ~0.58 (60-70% bucket: 56.9% actual rate); calibrated probability still exceeds fair_prob 0.5522, preserving ~3pp real edge. This exact matchup was a WIN on 05-08 (LAD 3-1). Justin Wrobleski (LAD SP, 5 GS, 1.25 ERA) has <6 starts but F3 is the primary driver, not SP edge.

DET @ KC.reasoning: Brenan Hanifee (DET SP) has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — SP-edge score impossible. Noah Cameron (KC SP) also has very limited 2026 data. Both SPs are thin-data arms; no reliable pick can be generated. PENDING status is correct.
